note: Reproducibility index — each sample dir contains the GT artifacts every baseline consumes (gt_rgb.mp4, gt_cameras.npz [c2w extrinsics + intrinsics], gt_depth_raw.npz [depth+scale], prompt.txt). Source-dataset record paths are NOT yet captured at inference time; the *_eval files in this dir are the canonical inputs for any sparse-eval or test-time-search.

samples.prompt: A silver robot arm with a black gripper extends toward a transparent plastic bag on a wooden table, accompanied by a green light. The gripper grasps the plastic bag, as a stationary right black robot arm rests beside a yellow potato chip cup. # humanoid robot

On a wooden surface, a black robot arm and a white robot arm collaborate to manipulate a white plastic bag. The white arm, equipped with a black gripper, picks up a bundle of toothpicks from a nearby package. Simultaneously, the black arm assists by opening the mouth of the bag, allowing the white arm to deposit the toothpicks inside. # bimanual robot with two finger grippers

The robot arm, primarily white with a black gripper, reaches for a white plastic bag. The gripper closes, securing the left side of the bag. A jar capped with black and a blue tube sit adjacent to the bag on the light brown surface. A Christmas sticker adorns the background window. The camera angle remains constant. # bimanual robot

The robot arm's black gripper grasps a white bottle, distinguished by its blue cap, from the tabletop. Next, the arm lowers the bottle into a white plastic bag. Finally, the robot hand retracts, releasing its hold on the bag.

A white robot arm descends, its black gripper aiming for a white plastic bag positioned on a light brown tabletop. Toothbrushes lie nearby, along with a package of red beans. Through a window in the background, a festive cartoon decoration is visible.
A black robot arm with a gripper extracts a glass jar of hawthorn tea from a white plastic bag. Subsequently, the gripper places the jar back into the bag. The camera remains stationary throughout.

A white robot arm with a black gripper advances toward a clear plastic bag adorned with a smiley face, which rests on a wooden table. The gripper hovers above the bag. # humanoid robot with two finger grippers

The silver robot arm with a black gripper and the black robot arm operate in sync above a light brown wooden surface. The black robot arm places a blue and white bottle into a white plastic bag and continues by picking up a black object, a yellow object, and a red object, subsequently adding each to the bag. The camera remains static, offering a continuous shot of the dual robot arms and their object manipulation. # humanoid robot
Two black robot arms maneuver a package of dried plum and tangerine peel cake, placing it carefully into a white plastic bag set on a wooden surface. # bimanual robot with two finger grippers

A white robot arm equipped with a black gripper picks up a package of dried plum and tangerine peel cake. The cake is then placed into a white plastic bag, which is held open by another black robot arm. The gripper closes securely around the package, moves it carefully into the bag, and releases its grip. The camera remains stationary, providing a clear view of the tabletop and the coordinated movements of the robotic arms. # humanoid robot with two finger grippers

Two robot arms, one black and one white, interact with a white plastic bag on a wooden surface. The arms reach into the bag to extract a small, red-and-white bottle. After a brief manipulation, the arms return the bottle to the white bag. A cartoon image is visible in the background. The camera is static, providing a close-up, overhead view of the action.

A white robotic arm stretches out, aiming for a clear plastic bag. Simultaneously, its black counterpart seizes a box of bubbly candy from the table, then carefully deposits the sweet treat into the waiting bag. # bimanual robot with two finger grippers

On a wooden table, a white robot arm handles a clear plastic bag decorated with a "Thank You" smiley face. Simultaneously, a second black robot arm extends and seizes a blue toothbrush cup from the same table. # humanoid robot
The robot arm grasps a small shampoo bottle. It then moves the bottle and drops it into a white plastic bag. # humanoid robot

A robotic arm, equipped with a black gripper, reaches toward a white plastic bag placed on a wooden surface. The gripper then enters the bag. Another robotic arm with a black gripper is visible, along with a small container and a snack package, all arranged on the wooden surface.

The white robot arm extends its black gripper towards a white plastic bag resting on a light brown table. Next to the bag is a package of snacks and steel wool. The gripper closes, grasping the white plastic bag on the left.
A robot arm with a gripper extends, grasps, and lifts a white plastic bag. # humanoid robot with two finger grippers
Two robot arms grab a small shampoo bottle. The arms then put the bottle inside a white plastic bag. # humanoid robot with two finger grippers

Upon a light brown table, a packaged ham sausage is poised above a white plastic bag, courtesy of a white robotic arm. Working in tandem, the white arm releases the sausage, depositing it into the bag. Subsequently, both the white and black robotic arms withdraw from the scene. The camera's perspective remains fixed throughout the process. # humanoid robot with two finger grippers
A white robot arm with a black gripper descends and grasps a transparent plastic bag.

One robot arm carefully positions a package labeled "spicy red duck neck" into a white plastic bag. A second robot arm provides support, holding the bag open. On the wooden table nearby, a bottle remains stationary. # bimanual robot with two finger grippers
The robot arm extends its black gripper and grasps a toothbrush resting on the wooden table.
A black robotic arm clutches a white plastic bag filled with red snacks. Simultaneously, a second black robotic arm retrieves a small white bottle capped in red from the wooden tabletop.

A white robot arm featuring a black gripper descends towards a table draped with a white plastic bag, alongside a toothbrush package, and a pack of red beans. The gripper plunges into the white plastic bag. # bimanual robot with two finger grippers
The robot arm with the black gripper lifts the square coffee bottle from the wooden surface.
Two collaborative silver and black robot arms hold a white plastic bag open. Subsequently, one of the arms grasps a small, multicolored shampoo bottle from the surface and deposits it into the bag.
A white robot arm, equipped with a black gripper, advances toward a white plastic bag resting on a wooden surface. The gripper then closes, securing the bag.

A black robot arm moves a red and white vitamin E lotion bottle from its gripper. A second black robot arm holds a white plastic bag open. The first arm places the lotion bottle into the bag, then both arms release their grip. # humanoid robot
Twin robotic arms elevate and unfurl a white polymer sack. Subsequently, a singular robotic limb carefully deposits a scarlet vial within the opened receptacle.

On the right, a mechanical arm grasps a pile of toothbrush packets. Extending towards the opposite side, the arm deposits the stack into a waiting white plastic bag, which is held open by another robotic limb.
The robot arm uses its gripper to grab the toothbrush, relocating it from the right side into the white plastic bag. # bimanual robot with two finger grippers
A white robotic arm reaches out, its black gripper closing around a white plastic bag. # humanoid robot with two finger grippers
Two black robot arms manipulate a white plastic bag. The right arm places a package of dried plum and tangerine peel cake inside the bag. # humanoid robot

The silver and black robot arms interact with a white plastic bag on a wooden surface. Near the bag are a food package and a small jar. The silver arm moves, attempting to grab the left side of the bag.

Two robot arms, each equipped with black grippers, work in tandem. The arms position a wrapped ham sausage directly over a white plastic bag, that rests on a wooden table. Once aligned, the grippers release, depositing the sausage into the bag. # humanoid robot

A white robot arm with a black gripper advances to seize a white plastic bag resting on a wooden table. Toothbrushes and a package of beans also occupy the table's surface. A second robot arm stands to the right, set against a decorative backdrop that features a drawing of Santa Claus. # bimanual robot with two finger grippers

Two black robot arms work independently above a wooden surface. Each arm grabs pieces of dried plum and tangerine peel cake. The arms move and put the cake pieces into a white plastic bag. Then, both arms pull back.
Two robot arms, each equipped with black grippers, manipulate a package of brown sugar. The arms lift the package from a wooden surface and deposit it inside a white plastic bag.

On a wooden surface, a red and pink candy box is seized by the gripper of a robot arm on the right. A second robot arm, positioned to the left, keeps a transparent plastic bag open. The candy is then transferred into the bag. # humanoid robot

On a wooden surface, a petite jar becomes the target as one dark robotic arm descends. Simultaneously, a second ebony robotic arm supports an open white plastic bag. The first arm seizes the jar and transfers it into the waiting bag.

Two robotic arms extend black grippers toward a translucent white plastic bag placed on a wood surface. Beside the bag rest a snack package and a bottle. The left arm manipulates the bag's opening. # bimanual robot

A gleaming white robotic arm, equipped with a black gripper, stretches towards a crinkled white plastic bag. Behind this primary target, another dark-toned robot arm remains stationary. # bimanual robot
A black robot arm with a gripper descends and seizes the handle of a white plastic bag on a wooden table, situated near a rectangular package and a cylindrical bottle.

One robot arm, featuring silver joints and a black gripper, holds open a clear plastic bag printed with black text. Simultaneously, the second robot arm, equipped with black joints and a silver gripper, carefully places a colorful, boxed aerated candy into the open bag. The camera maintains a static medium shot, documenting the collaborative action. # humanoid robot with two finger grippers
The black and white robot arms work together, carefully lowering a container of hawthorn tea into a white plastic bag. Afterwards, both arms pull back.
Two robotic arms equipped with black grippers maneuver a packaged ham sausage into a white plastic bag. # humanoid robot

Over a light brown surface, a pair of ebony robot arms operate in tandem. One arm, with a grasp opened wide, supports a white plastic sack. Simultaneously, its counterpart seizes a packet of crimson-hued spicy duck necks and deposits it within the awaiting bag. # bimanual robot

A white robotic arm, equipped with a black gripper, stretches toward a white plastic bag sitting on a light brown surface. Adjacent to the bag, a stack of toothbrushes and a package of beans are positioned. The camera magnifies the scene as the robotic arm advances towards the bag. A second, unmoving robot arm is located on the right. In the background, a glass surface displays a graphic of a smiling face. # bimanual robot with two finger grippers

The white robot arm, equipped with a black gripper, grabs a square coffee bottle. Another black gripper holds open a white plastic bag. The arm inserts the bottle into the bag. A red package sits on the wooden table beside the bag. # humanoid robot

On a wooden table, a white plastic bag, emblazoned with a smiley face, becomes the target of a robot arm. The arm, equipped with a black gripper, advances to seize the bag. # humanoid robot with two finger grippers
